name: XZ-Tank Cannon
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>ＸＺ</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>エックスゼット</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>－キャタピラー・キャノン
desc:
"X-Head Cannon" + "Z-Metal Tank"
Must first be Special Summoned (from your Extra Deck) by banishing the above cards you control. Cannot be Special Summoned from the GY. You can discard 1 card, then target 1 face-down Spell/Trap your opponent controls; destroy that target.
mnst_eff:
"X-Head Cannon" + "Z-Metal Tank"
Must first be Special Summoned (from your Extra Deck) by banishing the above cards you control. Cannot be Special Summoned from the GY. You can discard 1 card, then target 1 face-down Spell/Trap your opponent controls; destroy that target.
eff:
"X-Head Cannon" + "Z-Metal Tank"
Must first be Special Summoned (from your Extra Deck) by banishing the above cards you control. Cannot be Special Summoned from the GY. You can discard 1 card, then target 1 face-down Spell/Trap your opponent controls; destroy that target.

mst: Destroys your opponent's face-down Spell Cards
Destroys your opponent's face-down Trap Cards
summoning: Requires only specific monsters as Fusion Materials
Requires specific Normal Monsters as Fusion Materials
Requires specific Effect Monsters as Fusion Materials
Special Summons itself from your Extra Deck
Cannot be Special Summoned from the Graveyard
banished: Banishes Fusion Materials for Contact Fusion
